test-code.description: no violation - exactly at threshold, 2 ifs give complexity 3
violation - 3 ifs give complexity 4, one over threshold
test-code.code: fun process(a: Int, b: Int, c: Int): String { var result = "" if (a > 0) result += "a" if (b > 0) result += "b" if (c > 0) result += "c" return result }

test-code.description: no violation - nested function complexity does not count towards outer
violation - when expression with conditional branches
violation - boolean operators push complexity over threshold
violation - elvis operators push complexity over threshold
